pod oom.description: Pod is killed when it exceeds memory limits
pod oom.resolution: Increase memory limits in pod spec or optimize application to use less memory

crashloopbackoff.description: Container crashes and Kubernetes keeps restarting it
crashloopbackoff.resolution: Check application logs for errors, fix the code/config, or increase startup time with initialDelaySeconds

imagepullbackoff.description: Kubernetes cannot pull the container image from registry
imagepullbackoff.resolution: Verify image name, tag, registry credentials, or ensure registry is accessible

pending.description: Pod cannot be scheduled on any node
pending.resolution: Check node resources, labels/selectors, PVC availability, or resource requests

init:0.description: Init container failed during startup sequence
init:0.resolution: Check init container logs to identify the failure, fix configuration, or dependencies

evicted.description: Pod is forcibly removed due to node resource pressure
evicted.resolution: Increase node resources, optimize pod resource usage, or add more nodes

backoff.description: Container fails repeatedly and Kubernetes increases wait time between restarts
backoff.resolution: Check application logs, fix startup issues, or increase startupProbe initialDelaySeconds

error.description: Generic container error - application exited with non-zero status
error.resolution: Review application logs, check exit code, verify environment variables and configuration

cpu throttle.description: Pod CPU usage exceeds limits and is being throttled
cpu throttle.resolution: Increase CPU limits or optimize application performance

connection refused.description: Application cannot connect to service or external resource
connection refused.resolution: Verify service exists, DNS resolution works, firewall rules, or network policies
